notableEvents.label: Mike Trout GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Mike Trout grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Zach Neto out at 2nd. Mike Trout out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade grounds into a double play, shortstop Zach Neto to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Junior Caminero out at 2nd. Ryan Vilade out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Oswald Peraza singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Junior Caminero. Oswald Peraza to 2nd. Oswald Peraza advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Junior Caminero.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Madrigal to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Ben Williamson out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nick Fortes rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Nick Fortes grounds into a double play, third baseman Nick Madrigal to second baseman Oswald Peraza to first baseman Vaughn Grissom. Ben Williamson out at 2nd. Nick Fortes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Vilade reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Vilade reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Ben Williamson plunked
notableEvents.detail: Ben Williamson hit by pitch. Ryan Vilade to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: 2 straight HRs
notableEvents.detail: Back-to-back (or more) homers in one game
